# streaming-burst-window
# Sliding stream-processing window with cold backfill bursts and shifting hotsets.
10 11 12 13 10 11 12 13 14 15
10 11 12 13 10 11 12 13 14 15
10 11 12 13 10 11 12 13 14 15
50 51 52 53 54 55 56 57
12 13 14 15 12 13 16 17
12 13 14 15 12 13 16 17
12 13 14 15 12 13 16 17
70 71 72 73 74 75 76 77 78 79
14 15 16 17 14 15 18 19
14 15 16 17 14 15 18 19
14 15 16 17 14 15 18 19
